title: Jr. Backend Developer
description: Biz Kimiz? Günlük yaşamınızı iyileştirmek için akıllı ve yenilikçi çözümler üretmeye kendini adamış bir markayız. “Şımart Teknoloji” olarak sizlere, hayatınızı daha rahat, daha konforlu ve daha güvenli hale getirmek için tasarlanmış geniş bir ürün yelpazesi sunuyoruz. İşini severek yapan ve alanında uzman kişilerden oluşan ekibimiz ile en iyi ürünleri sunmak için sürekli son teknolojiyi araştırıyoruz ve geliştiriyoruz. Hızla büyüyen ve gelişen ekibimize, “Jr. Backend Developer” arayışımız bulunmaktadır. İş Tanımı ·        Backend servislerinin geliştirilmesi ve mevcut projelerin bakımına destek vermek, ·        API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerine katılmak, ·        Temiz, okunabilir ve sürdürülebilir kod yazmak, ·        Veri tabanı tasarımı ve optimizasyon süreçlerinde görev almak, ·        Yeni teknolojileri takip ederek uygulamalara katkıda bulunmak, ·        Yapay zekayı aktif olarak kullanarak sistemlere dahil etmek. Genel Nitelikler ·        Benzer pozisyonda 1 yıl deneyim sahibi oldum, ·        İyi derecede PHP ve MYSQL bilgim var, ·        Kurumsal şirket ortamını görme ya da çalışma imkanına sahip oldum, ·        Javascript, jQuery, HTML, CSS bilgine sahibim, ·        Etimesgut/Sincan bölgesinde ikamet ediyorum ya da ulaşım konusunda sıkıntı yaşamam diyorsan, başvurunu heyecanla bekliyoruz. Sunduğumuz İmkanlar ·        Genç ve dinamik bir ekip ile çalışma fırsatı, ·        Öğrenme ve gelişim odaklı bir çalışma ortamı, ·        Doğum günü izni, ·        Kaizen sistemi, ·        Aylık performans değerlendirme sistemi ve prim ödülleri. *Çalışma düzenimiz ofistendir.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer (.NET & Azure)
description: About Us Nartio is a London-based, fast-growing assessment company dedicated to helping organisations identify and develop talent scientifically and objectively. We provide innovative, data-driven solutions that support better people decisions. To learn more about us, visit www.nartio.com. Position Overview We are looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer to join our Istanbul team and take ownership of product development for Nartio’s scalable SaaS platform. This role sits at the intersection of software engineering, cloud architecture, product development, and AI-powered HR technology. You will play a key role in designing, building, and improving secure, high-performance web applications, APIs, and cloud-based services that support enterprise customers globally. What You’ll Do • Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications and APIs. • Build new product features from concept to production. • Develop secure and high-performance backend services using .NET. • Create modern, responsive user interfaces. • Design and optimise database structures. • Integrate third-party systems and external APIs. • Deploy and manage cloud infrastructure on Microsoft Azure. • Participate in architecture, code reviews, and technical planning. • Improve platform performance, reliability, and security. • Work closely with Product, Design, and Customer Success teams. What We’re Looking For • 5+ years of professional software development experience. • Strong expertise in C# and .NET Core / .NET 8+. • Experience with ASP.NET Core Web API development and RESTful APIs. • Strong experience with React, TypeScript, HTML5, and CSS3. • Experience with Entity Framework Core, LINQ, and Microsoft SQL Server. • Experience with authentication and authorisation, including JWT, OAuth2, and OpenID Connect. • Experience with background processing, queues, and asynchronous workloads. • Strong understanding of performance, scalability, secure coding, and clean architecture. • Practical experience with Microsoft Azure for SaaS applications. • Experience with Azure App Service, Azure Functions, Azure SQL, and Azure Storage. • Knowledge of cloud monitoring, logging, and reliability practices. • Experience with CI/CD using Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions. • Experience with Git-based workflows, automated testing, and Agile / Scrum methodologies. Nice to Have • Experience building B2B SaaS platforms. • Experience with multi-tenant application architecture. • Experience with AI and LLM integrations. • Knowledge of Azure OpenAI, vector databases, and semantic search. • Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, or Infrastructure as Code. • Experience working in HR technology, recruitment, assessment, talent management, learning and development, or analytics platforms. • Experience working in fast-moving startup environments. Nartio is an equal-opportunity employer. We encourage candidates from all backgrounds to apply.

title: Full Stack Software Engineering Intern
description: About Lufios Lufios is building AI for operational case tracking. We connect to the ERP, BI, SQL, Excel, and KPI reports companies already use, detect operational anomalies, investigate possible root causes with AI, and ask the right person what happened through channels like WhatsApp, Slack, Teams, and email. Dashboards show what broke. Lufios goes after why it broke, turns the answer into a tracked follow up, and builds a searchable operational memory over time. The product is live, demand is real, and the roadmap is moving faster than a two founder team can build alone. That is why we are looking for a Full Stack Software Engineering Intern to join us this summer. The Role You will work directly with the CEO and CTO on the live Lufios product. No fake intern projects. No layers. No corporate theater. Just you, the founders, real customers, and product work that actually ships. What You Will Do Build full stack features across frontend and backend Work on customer facing product flows Help improve integrations with WhatsApp, Slack, Teams, email, ERP and BI systems, SQL databases, and Excel based data sources Use AI assisted coding tools like Codex and Claude Code Debug, iterate, and ship fast Turn customer feedback into product improvements What We Are Looking For 2nd, 3rd, or 4th year university student Able to work full time over the summer Comfortable building software with JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, or a similar modern language Strong SQL skills and comfortable working with complex queries, joins, aggregations, and operational data Strong mathematical and statistical reasoning, with the ability to turn messy business data into clear logic and useful insights Basic understanding of frontend, backend, APIs, databases, and web apps Comfortable with AI assisted coding and fast iteration Curious about AI, B2B SaaS, startups, and how real businesses operate Hungry to learn, ship, and take ownership Compensation Paid internship plus direct mentorship from the founders. Stock option opportunities in ground.

title: Staff Backend Engineer (Financial Ledger)
description: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Staff Backend Engineer (Financial Ledger) based in Turkey. This role sits at the core of a rapidly evolving financial infrastructure powering a modern travel-tech SaaS platform. You will take ownership of a critical backend system responsible for financial accuracy, including revenue recognition, payments, ledger events, and profit calculation across a distributed environment. Rather than building from scratch, you will join an active evolution phase where foundational architecture already exists and is being expanded toward a more scalable and robust V2. The position requires deep technical leadership combined with hands-on engineering, ensuring the correctness and reliability of financial flows that directly impact business operations. You will collaborate closely with engineering and finance stakeholders to define invariants, validate system behavior, and guide architectural decisions. This is a high-impact role where your work becomes the backbone of financial truth for a growing SaaS ecosystem. Accountabilities Take technical ownership of the Financial Core system, guiding its evolution, challenging assumptions, and aligning architecture with long-term financial scalability. Ensure system integrity by validating lifecycle flows, reconciliation logic, and financial correctness across distributed services. Design and maintain ledger-style financial models, including revenue recognition, cost allocation, and multi-party transaction flows. Improve and enforce strict financial invariants within an event-driven architecture to ensure deterministic and auditable outcomes. Collaborate with finance and engineering leadership to translate business rules into robust technical implementations. Lead the evolution of a live production system, identifying gaps in current architecture and driving improvements toward future iterations. Support system reliability and scalability across payment, billing, and financial reporting domains. Contribute hands-on to backend development while shaping long-term architectural direction. Requirements 8+ years of backend engineering experience with strong ownership of financial, billing, or transactional systems. Proven experience building or maintaining financial platforms such as payment systems, billing engines, ERP solutions, or subscription infrastructure. Deep expertise in ledger systems, reconciliation mechanisms, and ensuring deterministic financial correctness. Strong understanding of financial concepts such as revenue recognition, liabilities, cost structures, and multi-party money flows. Experience evolving complex production systems in active environments without disrupting existing functionality. Hands-on engineering mindset with the ability to both design architecture and implement critical backend systems. Strong proficiency with Python and relational data modeling (PostgreSQL preferred). Experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems in cloud environments (AWS preferred). Ability to handle complex financial scenarios including multi-currency, taxation logic, and settlement flows. Benefits Competitive compensation aligned with senior-level backend engineering roles Fully remote-friendly work environment Opportunity to own a mission-critical financial system at the core of a SaaS transformation High-impact technical leadership role with significant architectural autonomy Exposure to complex financial systems and large-scale distributed architectures Collaborative environment working closely with engineering and finance stakeholders Modern cloud-based stack (AWS, event-driven systems, Python-based services) Long-term technical ownership of a foundational business system How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Java Backend Developer
description: We're Hiring: Java Developer Location: Hybrid – [Istanbul-Ankara] or Remote Employment Type: Full-Time Level: Mid-Level (3+ years experience) About the Role: We are looking for a Java Developer to join our dynamic and fast-growing software team. You will play a key role in designing, developing, and maintaining highly available and resilient applications. If you have a solid technical background, a passion for learning, and a team-oriented mindset, we’d love to meet you! Key Qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related field (preferred) Minimum 3 years of professional Java development experience Hands-on experience with Spring Boot, Spring MVC, and Spring Data JPA/JDBS, Hibernate Strong knowledge of Redis and Kafka Solid experience with relational databases such as MySQL or PostgreSQL Experience with MongoDB is required Proficient in multithreading and asynchronous programming Familiarity with web services such as REST and SOAP Comfortable working within Agile/Scrum methodologies Willingness to be involved in all stages of the software development lifecycle (analysis, development, testing, debugging, etc.) Eagerness to learn new technologies and continuously improve Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking skills Excellent communication skills and a collaborative mindset Actively using AI-powered development tools (e.g., Claude Code, ChatGPT Codex, etc.) to improve productivity and code quality What We Offer: Opportunity to work with modern technologies A supportive and dynamic team environment Room for personal and professional growth Projects that address real-world challenges How to Apply: If this role sounds like a good fit for you, please send your updated resume and any relevant project links (e.g., GitHub) to [hr@melasoft.com]
